codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly replaces the placeholder frontend artifact with a real Svelte SPA build using buildNpmPackage. The change switches from a static runCommand-generated HTML file to a proper npm-based build that produces hashed frontend assets. Caddy continues to serve the frontend at root with prefix-stable routing preserved.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Library documentation for nixos-config.md was well updated to explain the npmDepsHash resolution pattern and the Droid-Shield path interpolation technique.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/nixos-config.md contains clear documentation on how to compute npmDepsHash using `nix run nixpkgs#prefetch-npm-deps` and the empty-hash-and-error fallback pattern.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation correctly uses `handle` (not `handle_path`) in Caddy configuration for prefix-stable routing as required by the infra-worker skill.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: nix/node-b.nix uses `handle /auth/*`, `handle /api/*`, `handle /provider/*`, and default `handle` for the root, preserving the routing contract.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The services.yaml already documents the frontend-build command which matches the Nix build output expectations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml shows `frontend-build: cd frontend && pnpm build` which produces the same dist/ output structure as the Nix build.

summary: The deploy-built-frontend-artifact feature is complete and verified. The worker successfully replaced the placeholder frontend package with a real buildNpmPackage-based Svelte SPA build. The implementation includes: (1) package-lock.json generation for Nix reproducibility, (2) proper source filtering to exclude dev artifacts, (3) PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_BROWSER_DOWNLOAD to avoid sandbox failures, and (4) installPhase copying dist/ to $out. The subsequent workers (sessions 93cf3833 and 5558e539) verified the npmDepsHash on Node B x86_64-linux, deployed via nixos-rebuild, and confirmed the public root at https://draft.choir-ip.com/ serves built assets with real hashed references (VAL-DEPLOY-001 and VAL-DEPLOY-006 satisfied). No blocking issues found.
